page: Microsoft Azure E64nds_v6 is an Endv6-family virtual machine configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel processor. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

The instance features 3780 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, making it suitable for workloads requiring fast local read and write operations. It is designated as network-optimized, supporting high-throughput networking requirements. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Given the high memory density and large local storage capacity, this server is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that benefit from substantial RAM and local disk space.
description: Microsoft Azure E64nds_v6 is an Endv6-family virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This network-optimized instance offers 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It includes 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, providing a balance of high-capacity memory and fast local disk access without integrated GPUs. The hardware configuration is optimized for memory-intensive workloads, large database deployments, and enterprise applications requiring significant resource density and local storage capacity.
